articles.title: Blueprint
articles.author: Pansye H. Powell
articles.text: Who works with love will build a house of stone, Footed on solid rock and sturdy beamed, Will find the plan his love has patterned grown Lovelier far than he has ever dreamed.

articles.title: Vandal
articles.author: Dorothy J. Roberts
articles.text: Once I watched the hands of a child Destroy a rose; bruise the petaled Form, being unlearned in pain And its dark finale, death. Oh, uncompassionate one Who wounds by turning away, A tenderer than a flower's heart, With as frail a gesture, but more Cruel than those vandal fingers, Wanting their innocence.
